passiveAbilities.name: Weakling
passiveAbilities.description: Reduce all Melee Dmg this character deals by -1. Harvest actions cost this model +1 energy.

passiveAbilities.name: Slow
passiveAbilities.description: This model's Jog actions are limited to 2”.

passiveAbilities.name: Gnarled Staff
passiveAbilities.description: If this character deals Slicing or Piercing Melee Dmg, reduce the Dmg dealt to W. If this character deals Impact Melee Dmg increase the Dmg dealt by +1.

arcaneAbilities.name: Shadow Walk
arcaneAbilities.description:
Place this model within 2X”.
Catastrophe: The resisting player may place this model within 6".

arcaneAbilities.name: Smothering Darkness
arcaneAbilities.description:
Target suffers X+1 Magical Dmg and gets -1 Evade Stat until end of turn. 
Catastrophe: This model suffers 1 Wd and the target gets -2 Evade Stat until end of turn
